title: Terrainless World Generation
description: Datapack that creates worlds with missing terrain.
body:
# Terrainless World Generation

Imagine a normal Minecraft world. Now remove the terrain. That's what this datapack does.

Everything looks as if the terrain is there... but it's all gone.


Trees outline mountains and rolling hills, villages have winding roads going through invisible valleys. Dungeons and geodes are floating above the void. Shipwrecks beached on shores that aren't there. 

That is what you will experience with this datapack.

### Known Issues
- Chorus Fruit and Cacti spawn, but break instantly

### Check out this similar data pack I've made as well- [X-Ray World Generation!](https://modrinth.com/datapack/x-ray-world)

**Shout out to [Apollo](https://modrinth.com/user/Apollo) for discovering the technique to make this data pack possible!**
